@if (isLoading()) {

Loading addresses...

} @else if (step() === 'address') {

Shipping & Billing Address

@if (addresses().length > 0) {

Select Saved Address

@for (addr of addresses(); track addr.address_id) {
{{ addr.full_name }} @if (addr.is_default) { Default }

{{ addr.address_line1 }}

{{ addr.city }}, {{ addr.state }} {{ addr.postal_code }}

{{ addr.country }}

}
}

{{ addresses().length > 0 ? 'Or Add New' : 'Add New Address' }}

@if (selectedAddressId()) { } @else { }
} @if (step() === 'payment') {

Payment Information

info

Demo payment gateway active. Entry details will not be validated.

@if (error()) {

{{ error() }}

}
}

Order Summary

@for (item of items(); track item.id) {
{{ item.quantity }}x {{ item.productName }} ₹{{ item.price * item.quantity | number }}
}
Subtotal ₹{{ subtotal() | number }}
Taxes ₹{{ taxes() | number:'1.2-2' }}
Total ₹{{ total() | number:'1.2-2' }}
} @if (step() === 'success') {

Thank you for your order

Order #{{ placedOrder()?.order_number }} arrow_outward

Your payment has been successfully processed.

A confirmation email has been sent to your registered address.

Order Details

@for (line of orderLines(); track line.subscription_item_id) {
{{ line.product_name }} {{ line.quantity }} Units
₹{{ line.amount | number }}
}
Total Paid ₹{{ placedOrder()?.total_amount | number:'1.2-2' }}
}
